title: Smoky Savory Spanish Vegetable Stew
description: A hearty one-pot Basque dish featuring smoky gochugaru and tangy flavors, made Jain-friendly by avoiding animal products.

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: use a high smoke point oil

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add the gochugaru and smoked paprika, stirring to combine, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the canned diced tomatoes, vegetable broth, zucchini, bell pepper, salt, and black pepper, stirring to combine.
Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30 minutes.
Deglaze the pot with a little water if necessary, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
